pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting JStock source code (version 1.0.7.60). UIManager reports the Look And Feel name as 'Nimbus' and saves the class name 'javax.swing.plaf.nimbus.NimbusLookAndFeel' in options.xml. The task verifier correctly searches for the 'Nimbus' substring.
Verified by inspecting JStock source code (Utils.java) in version 1.0.7.60. The getApplicationVersionString() method returns '1.0.7', mapping the config path to ~/.jstock/1.0.7/.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated watchlist data. When changing the Look and Feel to Nimbus in JStock version 1.0.7.60, the application successfully sets the UI theme to 'Nimbus' and saves the class 'javax.swing.plaf.nimbus.NimbusLookAndFeel' into options.xml within the configuration directory /home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7.
